_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for pages/support/assignment-overview.html. Drives a single-card / sections-within layout via render_assignment_overview.py.

intro.label: The Three-Stage Rhythm
intro.body_html:
This course uses a three-stage rhythm for each module: BUILD → ENHANCE → MASTER. You don’t start from scratch each lab — you build on your own code, adding features as you learn new concepts.

By the MASTER lab, you’re already 60% done. The final assignment is just polishing what you’ve been building all along.

stages.label: BUILD
stages.whatYouDo_html:
• Read Chapter A (first chapter of the module)
  • Complete Book Exercises for Chapter A
  • Build your foundation program using Chapter A concepts only
  • Save this code — you’ll need it for the ENHANCE lab!
stages.whatsDue_html:
• BookEx 1 — due before the lab
  • Lab X.1 (BUILD) — due at end of stage

stages.label: ENHANCE
stages.whatYouDo_html:
• Read Chapter B (second chapter of the module)
  • Complete Book Exercises for Chapter B
  • Copy your BUILD code, rename to lab-X-2.py
  • Add Chapter B features to your existing code
stages.whatsDue_html:
• BookEx 2 — due before the lab
  • Lab X.2 (ENHANCE) — due at end of stage

stages.label: MASTER
stages.whatYouDo_html:
• Copy your ENHANCE code, rename to lab-X-3.py
  • Add final features and polish
  • Complete all documentation (docstrings, comments)
  • Submit your finished program
stages.whatsDue_html:
• Lab X.3 (MASTER) — due at end of stage
  • Module Exam — check the course schedule for exam window

whyThisWorks.label: Why This Works
whyThisWorks.intro_html: The three-stage rhythm isn’t arbitrary — it’s how professional software development actually happens, scaled down to one module.

cards.label: No Last-Minute Panic
cards.value_html: You code throughout the module, not just at the end. The work is spread out so you’re never cramming.

cards.label: Build on Your Own Code
cards.value_html: You’re not starting over each assignment. Your BUILD code becomes ENHANCE, which becomes MASTER.

cards.label: Catch Problems Early
cards.value_html: If something’s wrong in BUILD, you’ll find out before it breaks everything in MASTER.

cards.label: Real-World Skills
cards.value_html: Professional developers iterate on code all the time. This is how software actually gets built.
